headline: Stop emotional snacking today, you control Friday
summary: Today you break Friday's snacking cycle by staying disciplined on portions—each day off-pace digs you 0.80 kg deeper into failure.
details: Eat only pre-portioned Huel meals and whole foods today—no emotional snacking when cravings hit. Do a 45-minute rowing session or treadmill run to burn 1,500+ kJ and reinforce your commitment. Today matters because Friday is where your discipline typically collapses, and you're currently gaining 0.11 kg/week instead of losing 0.69 kg/week—this is where you reverse the trend.
